prompt: Add a patch PRD in docs/prd to prd-00020-checkout-redesign for manual review of high-risk guest checkout orders.
assertions: The run creates exactly one new markdown file under docs/prd.
The new file front matter has type prd, role patch, status draft, and parent prd-00020-checkout-redesign.
The new file includes the standard PRD sections and at least two FR-xx checklist items.
